arts.ttl: Arsenal legend makes Man United transfer admission about Ruben Amorim’s squad
arts.sum: Nigel Winterburn has told Ruben Amorim that he need not worry about Premier League rivals poaching his current Manchester United squad given their performances this season

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Manchester United ‘sharks’ in Leiria last night – Benfica and Sporting transfers on agenda
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United had officials at the Taça da Liga final on Saturday evening, as SL Benfica faced Sporting CP. The final was played at the Estádio Dr. Magalhães Pessoa in Leiria and after a 1-1 draw it went to penalties. Benfica ending up winning 7-6 and rightfully celebrated like they’d just won the World Cup. arts.ttl: Barcelona to continue Marcus Rashford pursuit next week
arts.sum: Barcelona are hopeful of making at least one signing this month, and Marcus Rashford is a player that is high on the agenda. arts.ttl: Player seen at airport as he flies to complete Manchester United transfer – Wished well by stranger
arts.sum: On Saturday morning, we covered reports from Paraguay which explained Diego León was set to fly to England yesterday to finalise his transfer to Manchester United. The 17-year-old left is owned by Cerro Porteño and had been indentified by Manchester United’s scouting system some months ago.
